resources:
Money Tracker Home Monthly Settings No budget set %1$d transactions Tap to Unlock Add Transaction Inflow Outflow Name Amount Category e.g. McDonald's 0.00 Specify category Date YYYY-MM-DD Note (optional) Add a note… Cancel Save Transaction Details Save Changes Delete ‹ About App Version 1.0.0 Money Tracker is a personal finance app designed to help you take control of your spending. Track your daily expenses and income, set monthly budgets, and gain insights into your financial habits — all from your phone.

Built with simplicity in mind, Money Tracker keeps your data private and stored locally on your device. Privacy Policy Your privacy is important to us. Money Tracker is designed with a privacy-first approach:

• All your financial data is stored locally on your device only. We do not collect, transmit, or share any of your personal or financial information.

• No accounts or sign-ups are required to use the app.

• Optional biometric authentication is handled entirely by your device's secure hardware and operating system. We never have access to your biometric data.

• The app does not contain any advertisements or third-party tracking.

• Exported CSV files are saved directly to your device's Downloads folder and are never uploaded anywhere.

By using Money Tracker, you agree that your data remains entirely under your control. Contact Have feedback or questions? We'd love to hear from you. moneytracker@jpalayoor.com Made by jpalayoor © 2026 Money Tracker App Logo Net balance Monthly budget RECENT TRANSACTIONS 💸 No transactions yet Tap + to add your first transaction ‹ Monthly Export CSV Net BREAKDOWN BY CATEGORY TRANSACTIONS ️🗂️ ️No transactions this month ️Last 6 months overview Budget Resets every month Default transaction type Pre-selected when adding Notifications Enable notifications Budget warnings and reminders Reminder frequency Appearance Dark mode Switch to dark theme Security Biometric lock Require fingerprint to open app Data Export all transactions Downloads as CSV file Export Categories New category Add About About Money Tracker > Delete Category Button Month $0.00 ↑$0 ↓$0 No budget s
